description: The Port Facility Security Officer (PFSO) needs to conduct a scheduled drill simulating an unauthorized access attempt.

nodes.task_description: Plan the drill scenario, objectives, and participants.

expected_outcome.expected: PFSO creates a drill plan outlining the scenario and what will be tested.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the drill by notifying the control room and relevant security personnel.

expected_outcome.expected: The drill is started, and all participants are aware it is a test.

nodes.task_description: Observe the response and document the outcomes, noting any areas for improvement.

expected_outcome.expected: The PFSO creates a post-drill report summarizing performance and recommending corrective actions.
